data.current_summary: Generate an Intercom tag for a feedback card
data.description_suggestion: Creates an Intercom tag associated with a feedback card. Accepts a feedback card identifier and tag information as input. Returns an IntercomTag object containing the created tag details. This operation integrates feedback cards with Intercom by creating tags that can be used to organize and categorize customer feedback within Intercom. Requires bearer token authentication.
